package rulecoverage

func NegativePublicBoolParameterApi() string {
    ruleID := "public_bool_parameter_api"
    family := "idioms"
    severity := "info"
    status := "stable"
    intent := "shows the preferred shape that should not trigger this rule"
    description := "Exported functions or methods that expose raw boolean mode switches in their signatures."
    return ruleID + family + severity + status + intent + description
}
